name: slack_read_messages
description: Read recent messages from a Slack channel. Requires a channel ID (e.g., C099KTQE1L5). Returns message history with timestamps, user info, and content for analysis.

channel.description: Channel ID (e.g., C1234567890). MUST be the exact 'id' value from slack_find_channel response. Do NOT use channel names or names with # prefix.

limit.description: Number of messages to return (1-10, default 5). Keep small to avoid context overflow.

latest.description: End of time range of messages to include in results (timestamp)

oldest.description: Start of time range of messages to include in results (timestamp)

inclusive.description: Include messages with latest or oldest timestamp in results

cursor.description: Paginate through collections of data by setting the cursor parameter to a next_cursor attribute returned by a previous request's response_metadata

examples.name: Read a few more messages if needed
